artifacts.summary: Two-phase implementation plan for the aerc INBOX querymap real-folder fix (both phases marked COMPLETED).
INBOX querymap entries for gmail and logos changed to bare exact-match form; scope-decision comment added.

phases.name: Fix INBOX querymap entries and document scope decision
phases.summary: In modules/home/email/aerc.nix changed INBOX=tag:inbox AND folder:/Gmail/ -> INBOX=folder:Gmail and INBOX=tag:inbox AND folder:/Logos/ -> INBOX=folder:Logos; added an inline comment recording why Unread/Flagged/Proposed-* stay account-wide. No other querymap lines changed. Pre-existing uncommitted edits for tasks 111 (compose block) and 113 (hooks block) left untouched.

phases.name: Build verification
phases.summary: Ran home-manager build --flake .#benjamin -- succeeded (exit 0, 4 derivations built). Confirmed rendered querymap-gmail/querymap-logos store outputs match expected content exactly via nix-store -q --outputs.

decision_unread_flagged_proposed.rationale: Tag-driven triage/search views (status), not folder-membership views (location); scoping Proposed-* to inbox would hide proposed-tagged messages and undermine the /email review gate. Inline comment added in aerc.nix recording this asymmetry.

verification.querymap_gmail_inbox_line: INBOX=folder:Gmail (confirmed via nix-store -q --outputs on built derivation)
verification.querymap_logos_inbox_line: INBOX=folder:Logos (confirmed via nix-store -q --outputs on built derivation)

next_steps: Activate with home-manager switch --flake .#benjamin to apply. INBOX tab should then show ~tens of messages (matching notmuch count folder:Gmail) instead of ~12k. Archived mail leaving the INBOX view depends on task 112.
